1.`32.*s])^2)/((2.`32. + Sqrt[4.`32. - 1.`32.*s])^2*(4.`32. - 1.`32.*s)*Log[0.25`32.*(4.`32. - 1.`32.*s)]) - (12.5663706143591729538505735331180115367886775975004232838998`32.*(2.`32. - 1.`32.*Sqrt[4.`32. -
